Parameter.name: LevelsTc
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets levels test condition to use for functional test execution.

Parameter.name: TimingsTc
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets timing test condition to use for functional test execution.

Parameter.name: Patlist
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets plist to use for functional test execution.

Parameter.name: PrePlist
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

Parameter.name: Pins
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets all pins used for capture of vectors.

Parameter.name: MaskPins
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the pins to mask for functional test execution.

Parameter.name: TotalCaptureCount
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the total amount of failures allowed if using PerCycleFails to generate vectors. Ignored otherwise.

Parameter.name: ApplyEndSequence
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets whether to apply the end sequence for this test execution.

Parameter.name: KeyForSharedStorage
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the key to use when inserting the final binary string into shared storage.

Parameter.name: FunctionalDataToUse
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the type of functional test data that will be used to generate vectors.

Parameter.name: Mode
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the decoding mode for this test method.

Parameter.name: Timeout
Parameter.descriptions: How long this test method should take to execute (in ms) before exiting out of port 0.

Parameter.name: ReverseVectorOutput
Parameter.descriptions: If true, reverses the bits of the output vectors before placing them into SharedStorage

ExitPort.PortDescriptions: Functional errors detected and parsed into a string.
No functional errors to parse, unexpected failing pin, or failed on preamble.
PORT FAIL FOR SW ERROR CONDITION
PORT FAIL FOR HW ALARM CONDITION
